description: Template schema — copy and customize for new .txt files

RefToSpecificColumn.description: References a specific column in another .txt file

RefToFirstColumn.description: References the first column of the target file (default key)

BooleanFlag.description: A 0/1 flag rendered as a toggle

EnumColumn.description: Hardcoded values when no lookup .txt file exists

RangeColumn.description: An integer column with range validation

AssetColumn.description: A column that references a DC6 image asset
